titleStmt.title: SII 22.242: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 242. (A.R. No. 242 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALLS.

summary.p: This is dated in the cyclic year Sarvadhāri without giving the Śaka year. It is possible that the inscription might be of the same period as No. 241 above. It records an agreement between the temple authorities and the Kaikkōḷas and Kaikkōḷa-mudalis of Tiruppanaṅgāḍu fixing the amount of taxes due on each loom to the temple, and the tax-free grant of 1350 kuḻi of land under the Śaḍaiyēri tank to nine persons as jīvita at 150 kuḻi each by the temple for keeping watch over the temple. These persons were to get besides, two nāḻi of offered rice every day from the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sarvatāri varuṣam tai mātam 2 tiyati Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaiṅkāvuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyil śrīmāheśvararum tāṉattārum tiruppaṉaiṅkāṭṭil kaikk(e)oḷar kaikkoḷamutalikaḷukku kalveṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭi Ivarkaḷ perkku taṟikkaṭamai vācal � maṟṟum pala Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa
varuṣattukku taṟi Oṉṟukku nālu � mum kiḻttaṟikku Iraṇṭu � mum putukkuṭikku � 3m koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum tirumeṉikāvalukku mutalikaḷ per Oṉpatukku per Oṉṟukku nilam caṭaiyerikiḻ nilatti
le nūṟṟuaiympatu kuḻi Āka Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Aiympatu kuḻiyum civitamāka carvamānyamāka śan=tiṟātittavaraiyum naṭakkakaṭavatu Ākavum mutalikaḷukku tirumenikāvalukku Aṭaicca nilaṅkaḷukku kaṭamai ponvari coṭi cūlavari mel piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari Eṉṟu cellakaṭavatu
Allavākavum yiṉnilam yiṟaiyili sarvamānyamāka caṉtiraātita varai naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum tirumeni kāvalukku Irunāḻi Ariciccoṟu nāḷ toṟum Iṭakkaṭavatākavum mutalikaḷukku varuṣattukku taṟikku 3 � koḷḷak kaṭavom Aṭaippu nilam taṟi pattukku Oṉṟu kuḻikku ceṟakkaṭavomākavum
Ippaṭikku cimāyecuranampi yeḻuttu Ippaṭikku tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koyil kaṇakku tiruppilicuramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
